# Jommar Ilagan

## Who
Full Stack Developer with 10+ years of experience. Based in Manila, Philippines.

## Focus
- AI Agent Infrastructure (orchestration, subagent patterns, tool configuration)
- Full-stack development (Vue/Nuxt, Node.js, Knex, MySQL/MS SQL)
- API design and integration (FHIR, REST)
- Agent tooling (opencode, Claude Code, MCP, skills, guardrails)

## Key Skills
- Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, SQL
- Frameworks: Vue.js, Nuxt, Node.js, Express, Knex
- Tools: Git, Docker, AWS Lambda, Cypress, Postman
- Databases: MySQL, MS SQL, Redis, PostgreSQL
- AI: Agent orchestration, LangChain/CrewAI/AutoGen ecosystem, MCP protocols

## Experience
- CoDev — Full Stack Developer (2023–present)
- Rendition Digital Inc. — Full Stack Developer (2022–2023)
- UERM — Senior Programmer (2012–2022)
